forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Becoming cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Becoming cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a light shower in the late morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a light shower in the late morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 21.

Becoming cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to northeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northerly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 22.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 26.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Nullarbor in the afternoon. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h early in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 25.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly during the day then tending southeast to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.
Sunny. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to northeasterly during the morning then tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower north of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.
